results.title: AI in April 2026: Biggest Breakthroughs, Models & Industry Shifts
results.snippet: Section 1 — The Model Wars: April 2026's Unprecedented Release Window April 2026 has become the densest AI model release window in the industry's history. Three frontier labs — OpenAI , Anthropic , and Google DeepMind — have each launched or confirmed major new models within weeks of each other. The benchmarks tell a story of rapid, simultaneous advancement across multiple capability ...

results.title: GPT-6 revealed: When will GPT-6 be released? - CometAPI
results.snippet: GPT-6 is expected to launch as early as April 2026 *— just weeks after completing pre-training on March 24 at OpenAI's Stargate supercluster in Abilene, Texas. Internally codenamed "Spud," this next-generation frontier model was developed in secret for roughly two years and is poised to deliver massive leaps in reasoning, multimodality, and real-world utility.

results.title: AI Release Tracker — Every LLM Release Since ChatGPT
results.snippet: AI Release Tracker is a free, continuously updated timeline of every major AI model release from the world's leading AI labs. We cover 174 tracked frontier models from Anthropic , OpenAI , Google , Meta, xAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Moonshot AI, Cursor, Z.ai, starting with the launch of ChatGPT on November 30 2022.
